README.md:
# NestJS REST API Starter

Generated with [Scaffinity](https://github.com/devi5040/scaffinity).

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run start:dev
```

This blueprint includes starter auth and users modules plus common guard/filter folders.
tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "module": "commonjs",
    "declaration": true,
    "removeComments": true,
    "emitDecoratorMetadata": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "target": "es2021",
    "sourceMap": true,
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "baseUrl": "./",
    "incremental": true,
    "strict": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true
  }
}
